title: FailingEvalContainer
description: The single-object envelope a FailingEval-emitting converter writes. Summary fields cover the whole experiment (not just the failures), so the audit trail survives the filter that produced the results array.

agent_revision.description: Git SHA (or similar) for the agent source the experiment was run against. When set on the container, individual FailingEval records inherit it; per-record agent_revision in metadata overrides.

total.description: Total rows in the source experiment (passing + failing).

passed.description: Rows that passed the filter — kept for audit even though they are not emitted.

pass_rate.description: passed / total, rounded to 4 decimal places.

score_band.description: The pass band the filter used. A row passed iff its primary scorer's score fell within [min, max]. The historical default {1.0, 1.0} is equivalent to a strict threshold of 1.0.

threshold.description: Backward-compat alias for score_band.min. Kept so v0.1 readers still parse v0.2 output without modification.

meets_threshold.description: True iff the experiment had zero failing rows. The diagnostic agent skips empty containers without doing model work.

clustered.description: True when results have been collapsed by the cluster pre-pass. cluster_size and cluster_member_ids will be set on each record.

cluster_count.description: Number of distinct clusters in results when clustered=true.

results.description: Every failing row, sorted by created ascending. Empty when meets_threshold=true.
